files.notes: The file contains a long article about the National Woman's Relief Society by Amy Brown Lyman, followed by the beginning of an editorial section. The editorial section appears to be cut off mid-sentence, ending with 'selective process by' which suggests this is part of a larger editorial that continues in another file.

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for May, each with different subject areas: Theology (Noachian Dispensation), Work and Business (Swat the Fly), Literature (James Whitcomb Riley), and Social Service (Problem Children). There is also a brief unrelated article about Egyptians using petroleum at the very end that appears to be from a different section.
